div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
User Table
user_id (PK)
name VARCHAR
email VARCHAR
password VARCHAR

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Product Table
product_id (PK)
name VARCHAR
price DOUBLE
description TEXT
image VARCHAR

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Cart Table
cart_id (PK)
user_id (FK)
product_id (FK)
quantity INT

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Orders Table
order_id (PK)
user_id (FK)
total_price DOUBLE
order_date DATE

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
OrderItems Table
item_id (PK)
order_id (FK)
product_id (FK)
quantity INT

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Payment Table
payment_id (PK)
order_id (FK)
card_name VARCHAR
card_number VARCHAR
expiry DATE
cvv INT

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Home Page
Dynamic
- Navigation
- Links to all pages

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Product Page
Dynamic
- View chocolates
- Add to basket

span.p:
Basket Page
- View items
- Update/Delete
- Ajax

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Checkout Page
- Login required
- Order review

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Order Confirmation
- Success message
- Continue shopping

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Password Rules
- 8+ chars
- Uppercase
- Lowercase
- Number
- Special char

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Card Validation
- Name required
- Number numeric
- Expiry valid
- CVV length
- No null values
